'''dosachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spacious|spacious]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spacious|spacious]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dosachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosachithi|dosachithi]] || [[word:dosachiji|dosachiji]] || [[word:dosachishi|dosachishi]] || [[word:dosachiki|dosachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosachuthuthu|dosachuthuthu]] || [[word:dosachujuju|dosachujuju]] || [[word:dosachushushu|dosachushushu]] || [[word:dosachukuku|dosachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosachuthu|dosachuthu]] || [[word:dosachuju|dosachuju]] || [[word:dosachushu|dosachushu]] || [[word:dosachuku|dosachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosachufthuf|dosachufthuf]] || [[word:dosachufjuf|dosachufjuf]] || [[word:dosachufshuf|dosachufshuf]] || [[word:dosachufkuf|dosachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosachethe|dosachethe]] || [[word:dosacheje|dosacheje]] || [[word:dosacheshe|dosacheshe]] || [[word:dosacheke|dosacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosachothotho|dosachothotho]] || [[word:dosachojojo|dosachojojo]] || [[word:dosachoshosho|dosachoshosho]] || [[word:dosachokoko|dosachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosachotho|dosachotho]] || [[word:dosachojo|dosachojo]] || [[word:dosachosho|dosachosho]] || [[word:dosachoko|dosachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosachofthof|dosachofthof]] || [[word:dosachofjof|dosachofjof]] || [[word:dosachofshof|dosachofshof]] || [[word:dosachofkof|dosachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfthĂŻf|dosachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfjĂŻf|dosachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfshĂŻf|dosachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfkĂŻf|dosachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dosachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dosachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dosachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dosachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfthĂŻf|dosachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfjĂŻf|dosachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfshĂŻf|dosachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfkĂŻf|dosachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfthĂŻf|dosachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfjĂŻf|dosachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfshĂŻf|dosachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dosachĂŻfkĂŻf|dosachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosachĂŠthĂŠ|dosachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dosachĂŠjĂŠ|dosachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dosachĂŠshĂŠ|dosachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dosachĂŠkĂŠ|dosachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosachathatha|dosachathatha]] || [[word:dosachajaja|dosachajaja]] || [[word:dosachashasha|dosachashasha]] || [[word:dosachakaka|dosachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosachatha|dosachatha]] || [[word:dosachaja|dosachaja]] || [[word:dosachasha|dosachasha]] || [[word:dosachaka|dosachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosachafthaf|dosachafthaf]] || [[word:dosachafjaf|dosachafjaf]] || [[word:dosachafshaf|dosachafshaf]] || [[word:dosachafkaf|dosachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dosachasha|dosachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dosachshĂ«sha|dosachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dosachrosha|dosachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dosachmusha|dosachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dosachyasha|dosachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godosachnkshĂ«sha|godosachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godosachnkrosha|godosachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godosachnkmusha|godosachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godosachnkyasha|godosachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dosasachasha|dosasachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dosasachshĂ«sha|dosasachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dosasachrosha|dosasachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dosasachmusha|dosasachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dosasachyasha|dosasachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godosasachnkshĂ«sha|godosasachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godosasachnkrosha|godosasachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godosasachnkmusha|godosasachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godosasachnkyasha|godosasachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:desĂŠchasha|desĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:desĂŠchshĂ«sha|desĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:desĂŠchrosha|desĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:desĂŠchmusha|desĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:desĂŠchyasha|desĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godesĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|godesĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godesĂŠchnkrosha|godesĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godesĂŠchnkmusha|godesĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godesĂŠchnkyasha|godesĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dosfachasha|dosfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dosfachshĂ«sha|dosfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dosfachrosha|dosfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dosfachmusha|dosfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dosfachyasha|dosfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godosfachnkshĂ«sha|godosfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godosfachnkrosha|godosfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godosfachnkmusha|godosfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godosfachnkyasha|godosfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
